meta.site_description: We organize thoughtfully crafted trips for youth and seniors – one-day and multi-day excursions in Poland and abroad with comfortable transport and guides.

hero.headline: Thoughtful Trips for Youth and Seniors
hero.subheadline: We organize one-day and multi-day trips, camps and group travel in Poland and abroad. We combine activity, integration, sightseeing and smooth organization from start to finish.

seniors.title: Senior Trips
seniors.description: Travel at a comfortable pace with quality transport, guide support and a program tailored to the group. We focus on culture, nature, history, local flavors and time to relax.

youth.title: Youth Trips
youth.description: We organize school trips, camps and active trips for young people. We combine education, team building, adventure and solid organization.

oneday.title: One-Day Trips
oneday.description: Perfect for schools, seniors and organized groups. Interesting program, simple transport and efficient organization.

multiday.title: Multi-Day Trips
multiday.description: Comprehensive multi-day trips with transport, accommodation, meals and guide support. We organize everything from start to finish.

trips.name: Secrets of Podlasie
trips.subtitle: 7 days of nature, history and unique places
trips.short_desc: Podlasie at a comfortable pace – an ideal trip for seniors with quality transport, accommodation, HB meals and guide support.

past_trips_section.title: Past Trips
past_trips_section.subtitle: See where we've been and what we do for our participants

trips.name: Austria, Slovenia and Czech Republic
trips.description: The trip combined relaxed sightseeing, nature and culture. The program included Landskron, eagle show, Villach, Klagenfurt, Pyramidenkogel, Finsterbach waterfall, Gerlitzen, boat cruise to Ossiach, Ljubljana, Vienna and Brno.

trips.name: Gdynia for Youth
trips.description: We organized a one-day youth trip to Gdynia combining education, history and time to relax by the sea. The program included the Emigration Museum, port walk, ORP Błyskawica and beach relaxation.

trips.name: Kayaking on Brda River
trips.description: For students of 1st High School in Bydgoszcz we organized a one-day kayaking trip on the Brda River from Opławiec to Zimne Wody Marina. After the active part, participants relaxed by the bonfire roasting sausages.

reviews_section.subtitle: See what participants say about our trips
reviews_section.google_text: Your review helps other travelers. Been on a trip with us? Share your experience!

about.title: About Us
about.text: Patent na Podróż is a travel agency born from a passion for active recreation, education and discovering characterful places. We organize trips for seniors, youth and organized groups. We care about the program, logistics, comfort and good atmosphere.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.content_html:
1. Data controller

The controller of personal data collected through patentnapodroz.pl is Clever Training Sp. z o.o., registered at ul. Wczasowa 34, Bydgoszcz, Poland, a licensed tour operator registered in the Polish Central Register of Tourism Organizers and Intermediaries (CEOTiPO) under number 42246. Tax ID (NIP): 9532786916, REGON: 520772585, KRS: 0000941682.

Contact for data protection matters: patentnapodroz@gmail.com, phone +48 501 034 351.

2. What data we process

We process personal data voluntarily submitted through the contact form: full name, phone number, email address, and the content of your inquiry. Providing this data is voluntary but necessary to respond to your inquiry or prepare a trip offer.

3. Legal basis and purposes

  • Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR — consent given by checking the box on the contact form,
  • Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — to take steps prior to entering into, or to perform, a package travel contract,
  • Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — our legitimate interest in responding to inquiries and direct marketing of our own services.

4. Recipients of data

Contact form data is passed to our form-processing provider, Web3Forms, solely to technically deliver messages to our inbox. The site also loads Google Fonts from Google's servers, which transmits your IP address to Google when the page loads.

We do not sell or share personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

5. Retention period

Inquiry data is kept for as long as needed to handle the inquiry, and — if a contract is concluded — for the period required by Polish tax and accounting law (typically up to 5 years from the end of the year in which the transaction occurred).

6. Your rights

You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing of, and port your data, and to object to processing. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Polish Data Protection Authority (Prezes UODO) if you believe processing violates GDPR.

7. Cookies

The site does not currently use analytics or advertising (tracking) cookies. The only external resource loaded is Google Fonts (see section 4). If analytics tools (e.g. Google Analytics) are introduced in the future, this policy will be updated and a cookie consent banner will be added.

8. Data security

We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or destruction, including HTTPS encryption.

terms_page.title: Terms & Conditions
terms_page.content_html:
Note: this is a draft skeleton of the Terms & Conditions (OWU) as a starting point. As a licensed tour operator registered with CEOTiPO, Clever Training Sp. z o.o. is subject to Polish package travel law — legal review is recommended before publishing, and the insurance/guarantee fund details (section 6 below) still need to be filled in.

1. General provisions

The organizer of the trips is Clever Training Sp. z o.o., registered at ul. Wczasowa 34, Bydgoszcz, Poland, in the Polish Central Register of Tourism Organizers and Intermediaries (CEOTiPO) under number 42246. Tax ID (NIP): 9532786916, REGON: 520772585, KRS: 0000941682.

To be completed: the insurer/guarantee fund details required by Polish package travel law.

These Terms & Conditions govern participation in trips organized by the Organizer and form an integral part of the package travel contract.

2. Booking and payment

A package travel contract is concluded once signed by the participant (or their legal representative) and upon payment of a deposit or full amount as specified for the given trip. Specific payment terms (deposit amount, balance due date) are set individually per trip.

3. Cancellation and changes

Participants may withdraw from the contract before the trip begins. Depending on the timing of cancellation, costs actually incurred by the Organizer (e.g. deposits paid to carriers, hotels, guides) may be deducted. Specific cancellation and refund terms are provided with each offer.

4. Participant rights and obligations

Participants must follow the trip itinerary, instructions from the tour leader/guide, and local rules at each destination. The Organizer reserves the right to modify the itinerary for reasons beyond its control (e.g. weather, administrative decisions), while maintaining an equivalent standard of trip.

5. Complaints

Participants may submit a complaint about non-conformity of travel services in writing or by email (patentnapodroz@gmail.com) within a reasonable time after the trip ends. Complaints are handled in accordance with applicable law.

6. Financial protection

To be completed: name of the insurer/guarantee provider, policy number, and coverage amount — a mandatory disclosure for tour operators under Polish package travel law.

7. Personal data

Personal data handling is described in our Privacy Policy.

8. Final provisions

Matters not covered by these Terms are governed by the Polish Civil Code and the Act on Package Travel and Linked Travel Arrangements. Disputes will be resolved by the court competent for the Organizer's registered seat or the consumer's place of residence, as applicable under law.
